## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)

## Checklist

- [ ] I built and ran the tests locally (`cmake --build build && ctest --test-dir build`)
- [ ] The change is focused and scoped to one logical concern
- [ ] I updated docs/comments where relevant
